title: Easy Wool Cutter 🪚
description: Craft any wool type in the stone cutter!
body:
**🧶 Easy Wool Cutter**

Tired of wasting dyes?
With Easy Wool Cutter, you can now craft any color of wool directly in the stonecutter — using just one white wool!
Simply place a white wool block in the stonecutter and choose your desired color.
No dyes, no crafting table — just quick and easy color changes!

**🪚 Features:**

Convert white wool → any wool color instantly
Works in the stonecutter for smooth crafting
Fully vanilla-friendly — no extra items or tools
Great for builders and decorators

**🎨 Example:**

White Wool → Red Wool

White Wool → Blue Wool

White Wool → Any of the 16 wool colors

![wool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e00f2cde7a9257b3f012fab9575eb7539bf912b.png)
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

 ![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

 This mod have been created with IntelliJ
 
#AD
